title: Lost Backcountry Skier — Severe Hypothermia
briefing: Solo ski tourer reported 6 hours overdue. Located by SAR team in an alpine bowl after sundown, partially sheltered behind a boulder. Found cold, drowsy, and no longer shivering. Core temperature unmeasured in field — handle gently, assume severe hypothermia.
environment: Alpine bowl, night, cold and windy
terrain: Exposed alpine bowl above treeline; technical ground egress, possible helicopter hoist at first light
evacNote: Severe hypothermia — gentle handling, warm before pronouncing, rewarming-capable facility

patient.mechanism: Prolonged cold exposure, 6+ hours overdue, lost on backcountry ski tour

injuries.notes: Shivering has stopped. Slow, shallow breathing. Bradycardic. Core temp unmeasured — treat as severe. SpO2 reading unreliable in cold periphery.
